name: FARS: A Fully Automated Research System Deployed at Scale

description: arXiv:2606.31651v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Recent automated research systems show that language-model agents can generate hypotheses, run experiments, and write complete manuscripts, but most evidence still comes from selected examples, human-framed topics, or a few pre-defined research tasks. We present FARS (Fully Automated Research System), a fully automated AI-for-AI research syste...
